rationale: Decomposition is sound by the plan's own heuristics, verified at 001ed3a5 (delta from the plan's 3ddf2a1f pin is plan.md only, so all line refs hold). Count: 4 beads, 1:1 with R1-R4, in the 3-5 target. Dependencies: frontmatter declares zero depends_on edges and none is missing — no bead consumes another's produced state; Bead 3's tests reuse PRE-EXISTING shared infra (mkPanelTestRoot:30, writePanelFixture:48, snapshotTree:66, resetPanelCreateFlags:92 in panel_test.go), not Bead-1 output. Longest chain = 1. The Bead1->Bead3 note is correctly labeled merge-scheduling, not a dependency: they edit disjoint regions of cmd/mindspec/panel.go (B1: resolvePanelGateFacts ~302, renderPanelVerify:346, renderPanelTally:456, tallyExitAction:526; B3: panelCreateCmd:52/init:210-218 — no --gate exists today, confirmed). Merge signal: R_scope = 4 shared / 14 unique paths = 0.29, healthy band; no file referenced by 3+ beads. B1's two halves are one cohesive outcome (truthful non-bead verbs) in one file; B2/B4 pass the trivial-work test as spec-requirement-carrying, domain-distinct, independently AC-verifiable beads. Each bead is one-round panel-verifiable with crisp fences.
findings: R_scope over declared key_file_paths = 4/14 ~= 0.29 (band 0.15-0.50); overlapping paths: cmd/mindspec/panel.go + panel_test.go + workflow/interfaces.md (B1+B3), internal/config/config.go (B3+B4). No 3+-bead file. No merge signal.

Zero false depends_on edges and zero missing true edges: B3's --gate stamping reads nothing B1 produces; shared cmd/mindspec test infra pre-exists at 001ed3a5. Longest serial chain = 1; B1-before-B3 is textual-conflict scheduling only and the plan says so in both the frontmatter (depends_on: []) and both beads' Depends-on prose.

Grounding of decomposition-relevant claims verified live: resolvePanelGateFacts at panel.go:302-315 with IsBead() guard; revParseForPanelFn seam at panel.go:37-39 (doc comment currently create-only, matching the plan's extend-doc-comment step); gate.go:372 'bead/'+beadID rev-parse and 186-189 malformed leg-5 Warn; PanelGateKeys single declaration at config.go:101; RawMergeFence exported at gate.go:58; panel create today registers only spec/target/bead/round flags.

MINOR (non-blocking): key_file_paths is the bead's context surface (spec 097 R4 -> metadata.file_paths), so B1 listing internal/panel/gate.go + internal/instruct/panelstate.go (zero-diff-fenced files) is correct as read context, but an implementer could misread them as edit targets; the plan body's emphatic ZERO-byte fence plus the git show --name-only verification check adequately counters this.

Trivial-work borderline noted and accepted: B2 (one-char regex class + mirror cp + pin test) and B4 (comment + pinning test) are small, but each carries its own spec AC, pre-existing bead ID under epic r6hk, and a disjoint file/domain set — folding either into a neighbor would cross domains without reducing coordination. Tool grouping honored: B2 keeps node matrix + cmp + go test in one bead.
Chunk-id -> bead_ids positional mapping is consistent: 1=mindspec-4d9m(R1), 2=lczt(R2), 3=zw81(R3), 4=cthj(R4), matching the ## Bead N section order the approve machinery requires.
